data.title: Write agent standard-reference verification test
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh that verifies:
1. plugins/dso/agents/red-test-writer.md contains a path reference to plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
2. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-test-quality.md contains the same path reference
3. plugins/dso/agents/red-test-evaluator.md contains the same path reference
4. plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md contains a "## Rule 5" section heading

This is a structural/metadata validation test (acceptable per behavioral testing standard). The test confirms that path-referencing agents will auto-consume Rule 5 when it is added to the standard.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh
- [ ] Test verifies red-test-writer.md references behavioral-testing-standard.md
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "red-test-writer"
- [ ] Test verifies code-reviewer-test-quality.md references behavioral-testing-standard.md
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "code-reviewer-test-quality"
- [ ] Test verifies red-test-evaluator.md references behavioral-testing-standard.md
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "red-test-evaluator"
- [ ] Test verifies behavioral-testing-standard.md contains Rule 5 heading
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-agent-standard-reference.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "Rule 5"
